summary: Tested Tax Prep Portal 5-step wizard and Financials API. All backend API tests (26) and frontend E2E tests (29) passed. Tax Prep feature includes Income (1099 and Other), COGS, Deductions (Expenses + Mileage), Documents upload, and Generate Reports with financial summary calculations.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during API tests using year 2099 and 2098 to avoid conflicts with production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Prep Portal fully tested: 1) 5-step wizard navigation works correctly, 2) Year selection persists across step navigation via URL params, 3) All CRUD operations for Income (1099 and Other), COGS, Expenses, and Mileage work correctly, 4) Financial summary calculations are accurate (Gross Profit = Income - COGS, Net Profit = Gross Profit - Deductions), 5) IRS mileage rate for 2025 is $0.70/mile, 6) Documents upload UI is present but file upload not tested, 7) Download reports buttons are present but actual download not tested.

tax_prep_main_page.details: 5-step wizard displays correctly with progress bar, year selector, and step navigation

income_step.details: Add/Delete 1099 and Other Income entries work correctly with platform selection

cogs_step.details: Add/Delete inventory purchases with source, amount, date, item count, and description

deductions_step.details: Mileage and Expenses sections display correctly with Add Trip and Add Expense modals

documents_step.details: Upload area displays with file type restrictions (PDF, JPEG, PNG up to 10MB)

generate_reports_step.details: Tax Summary displays with correct calculations and download options

year_persistence.details: Year selection persists across step navigation via URL query params

step_progress.details: Save & Continue marks step complete and navigates to next step

backend_expenses_api.details: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/financials/expenses endpoints work correctly with category grouping

backend_mileage_api.details: GET/POST/DELETE /api/financials/mileage endpoints work correctly with IRS rate calculation

backend_tax_prep_progress_api.details: GET/PUT /api/financials/tax-prep/progress endpoints work correctly with completion percentage
